Text: I had the opportunity to work alongside Himanshu during our time together at HCL, and it was a truly enriching experience. He consistently demonstrated deep technical expertise in Salesforce and was the go-to person for solving complex issues. What stood out most was his calm and structured approach to problem-solving, even under high-pressure situations.  Beyond his technical skills, he was an excellent team player who was always willing to mentor others and share knowledge, which made a big difference in our team’s growth. His professionalism, reliability, and ability to build trust with both colleagues and stakeholders set him apart.  I’m confident that any organization working with Himanshu will benefit greatly from his expertise, dedication, and collaborative spirit.

Job Title: Global Head of Advisory | Financial Services
Text: I had the opportunity to work with Alwin during his time as Partner & Head of Consulting at Genpact, and it was an invaluable experience. Alwin brings a rare combination of deep industry expertise, strategic vision, and hands-on leadership. His ability to simplify complex challenges, craft client-centric strategies, and inspire confidence among stakeholders sets him apart as a true leader in financial services transformation.  I particularly valued working alongside him on an RFP in Germany, where his clarity of thought, client engagement skills, and structured approach were instrumental in building trust and presenting a compelling solution. Alwin not only drives results but also creates an environment of collaboration and learning for those around him.  I would highly recommend Alwin as a trusted advisor and leader — his passion for client success and his depth of expertise make him an asset to any organization.

had the opportunity to work closely with Oli during the implementation of Santander’s digital onboarding programme. As the Product Owner, Oli demonstrated exceptional leadership, balancing the strategic vision for the platform with practical execution. His deep understanding of Salesforce, combined with his focus on operational efficiency and user adoption, ensured the programme delivered real business value.  Oli is highly collaborative and structured, managing priorities, stakeholders, and risks with clarity. His guidance was instrumental in aligning our implementation with Santander’s objectives, enabling a seamless and high-quality onboarding experience.  I highly recommend Oli as a Product Owner — he brings a rare combination of technical knowledge, strategic insight, and stakeholder management excellence to any Salesforce initiative.

I had the opportunity to work with Ceri during the Santander digital onboarding implementation, where he played a pivotal role as the Salesforce Architect. His deep expertise in Salesforce and strong architectural vision were critical in shaping and digitalizing the onboarding process, ensuring both scalability and compliance with complex business requirements.  Ceri is highly collaborative and has the rare ability to bridge business needs with technical solutions. He guided the design discussions with clarity and foresight, making it easier for us as implementation partners to align our delivery with Santander’s long-term digital strategy.  What stood out to me most was his pragmatic approach — he not only understood the platform inside out but also had a clear sense of how to simplify processes and deliver real value for the business. His leadership and technical insight were instrumental in the success of the program.  I would highly recommend Ceri as an architect and technology leader for any organization embarking on a Salesforce-driven transformation.

I had the privilege of working during Sandeep’s leadership at Genpact, and it was a truly inspiring experience. His ability to connect technology strategy with business outcomes stood out, enabling large-scale digital transformation with lasting impact. What impressed me most was his empowering leadership style — he created an environment where teams could innovate, grow, and consistently deliver excellence. Sandeep is a visionary leader whose guidance continues to influence my professional journey.

I had the privilege of reporting directly to Shweta at Genpact, and it was an invaluable experience. Shweta is a visionary technology leader with deep expertise in Salesforce, Mulesoft, Adobe, and other enterprise platforms. She has an exceptional ability to align technology with business strategy and drive large-scale digital transformation with measurable impact.  Her leadership style is clear, empowering, and inclusive. She sets a strong strategic direction while enabling her team to innovate and deliver at the highest standard. Working under her guidance not only enhanced my technical and strategic skills but also gave me a broader perspective on driving transformation at scale.  I highly recommend Shweta as a leader who combines strong technical acumen with the ability to inspire, mentor, and deliver sustainable business outcomes.

Ankur has a vast knowledge of Oracle and has implemented multiple projects involving medium to very high complexity. He was able to design and provide solutions to all the technical issues raised, when implementing the integration. I would highly recommend him.
